# ImageCreator.Error.conceptsRequirePersonIdentity

**Case**

An error that indicates that a source image containing a person’s face needs to be added in order to complete the request.

## Declaration

```swift
case conceptsRequirePersonIdentity
```
title: ImageCreator.Error.conceptsRequirePersonIdentity
